name: chain__ops_pilot_delivery_playbook__how_to_
method: # Ops Pilot Delivery Playbook  **How to deliver a Back-Office Automation Pilot in 10 days**  ---  ## Overview  The Ops Pilot automates a single back-office workflow that the client identified during t

stages.task: Scrape Indeed/LinkedIn for companies posting data-entry, manual-processing, back-office-coordinator roles — these signal automatable workflows
Score prospects by: company size (10-200 employees sweet spot), tech stack signals, number of ops roles posted, industry (legal/logistics/finance = high-value). Filter to top 20 per batch

Generate personalized cold email using prospect's specific job posting as proof they need automation. Template: 'I noticed you're hiring for [ROLE]. That workflow can be automated in 10 days for a fixed fee — no ongoing contract.' Leverage procedural memory for objection handling
